items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for assignment to a responsible party.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the assignment of punch list items to responsible parties, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions auto-assignment of contractors but lacks concrete API evidence or persisted state checks to demonstrate that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
